series_metadata.series_description: Spreadsheet list of all agency smart phones, computers, and monitors assigned to an employee/ room.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until superseded, obsolete, or replaced, and until no longer of administrative value or 3 years, then destroy ; Electronic: Retain until superseded, obsolete, or replaced, and until no longer of administrative value or 3 years, then destroy, Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Erase
